title: RFE: Support for command line or synthesis script `defines
body:
Say I have an existing code base that has constructs like this:
```
`ifndef SYNTHESIS
    $display("Printer port on fire");
`endif
```
I can easily filter out these constructs during synthesis by specifying -DSYNTHESIS on the command line or somewhere as a global variable in a synthesis script.

I haven't found a solution on how to do this with Yosys.

I've seen the following reddit comment about "Resolve `define"
https://www.reddit.com/r/yosys/comments/56ac1y/resolve_define/
which states "The right way to do this is by using includes."

That doesn't make me very hopeful. The proposed solution requires either wrapping *all* files where this construct is used or modifying all these files with an `include. That's not a happy prospect to work around a missing feature that's supported by all other synthesis and simulation tools that I know of.

Am I overlooking some trivial way of accomplishing this that doesn't require the reddit solution? If not, I'd really like to vote to have these kind of global `define to be added as a feature for a future version of Yosys.

Tom
